Hero.Title: Manage & Analyze Your miHoYo Gacha Records
Hero.Subtitle: Supports Genshin Impact, Honkai: Star Rail, Zenless Zone Zero and more. No local proxy server required. Simply read Chromium disk cache files to quickly fetch and analyze your gacha record.

Feature.Title: Core Features
Feature.Subtitle: Providing you with a smooth and private gacha record management experience

MultiGame.Title: Multi-Game Support
MultiGame.Subtitle: Supports Genshin Impact, Honkai: Star Rail, Zenless Zone Zero and more.

MultiAccount.Title: Multi-Account Management
MultiAccount.Subtitle: Manage multiple game accounts with data isolation.

NoProxy.Title: No Proxy Required
NoProxy.Subtitle: Directly read Chromium disk cache links, fast and convenient.

Analysis.Title: Gacha Analysis
Analysis.Subtitle: Statistics on pity, 5-star distribution, gacha trends.

Database.Title: Local Database
Database.Subtitle: All user data stored locally for privacy and security.

Converters.Title: Import · Export
Converters.Subtitle: Supports UIGF (v2.0 - v4.2) · SRGF v1.0 · CSV and more.

Database.Title: Database File Location:
Database.Subtitle: HoYo.Gacha.v1.db in the application directory, containing all accounts and gacha records. Make sure to keep this file when migrating or reinstalling your system.

Footer.Content: Fan-made tool · Open source under MIT OR Apache-2.0 · For personal learning and communication only · Made with <tauri /> and <heart /> by <lgou2w />
